title: Create-O-Rama
description: Modpack focused on Create, adventure, and ambience like no other (maybe)
body:
Create-O-Rama is a modpack currently in Alpha that adds an overwhelmingly large amount of content centred around (but sometimes far off from) the Create mod. Several world generation mods keep the terrain constantly interesting as you progress forward in Create. Also, food isn't mandatory. The food system is neat. Honestly, special shout-out to Spice of Life: Valheim Edition for that hunger system. I just hope they fix it so you don't spawn immediately with normal health and then have your health lowered like a second later. It's a nitpick, but it does mildly annoy me. 

Oh yeah you probably want to actually see the modpack. Here's a neat video: 
[https://youtu.be/SQtoJU_aAKY?si=lz4fNQEhiXGxwEFI](https://youtu.be/SQtoJU_aAKY?si=lz4fNQEhiXGxwEFI)

Alrighty, I hope this is descriptive enough for the moderators to approve it this time. 

P.S. Essential is built-in and compatible, so you can play multiplayer with friends n stuff for free
